channel.title: HackerNews 日本語まとめ & AI要約
channel.description: HackerNewsのトップ記事を毎日日本語翻訳・AI要約して配信

item.title: 2026年5月6日（23:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 The best is over: The fun has been optimized out of the Internet #2 AI didn't delete your database, you did #3 Agents for Financial Services and Insurance #4 Three Inverse Laws of AI #5 iOS 27 is adding a 'Create a Pass' button to Apple Wallet #6 Async Rust never left the MVP state #7 Should I Run Plain Docker Compose in Production in 2026? #8 Simple Meta-Harness on Islo.dev #9 When everyone has AI and the company still learns nothing #10 AI Product Graveyard
